/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/app.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/i686-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/app.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/app.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/i686-w64-mingw32-g++ -m32 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/app.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bin/app.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libapp.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles/app.dir/linkLibs.rsp
